name: bundle_resource_input
description: Provide a json resource to create on the server. Please make sure other resources referenced in the input resource are already present on the server.
title: Bundle resource to create on the server.

name: bundle_resource_ids
description: If providing multiple IDs, separate them by a comma and a space. e.g. id_1, id_2, id_3. If leaving blank, test will use the resource id from Bundle resource created by previous test.
title: ID(s) for Bundle resources present on the server.

name: composition_resource_input
description: If left blank, this test will be skipped.
title: TOC Composition resource to create on the server.

name: composition_resource_ids
description: If providing multiple IDs, separate them by a comma and a space. e.g. id_1, id_2, id_3. If leaving blank, test will use the resource id from Composition resource created by previous test.
title: ID(s) for TOC Composition resources present on the server

name: organization_resource_input
description: Provide a json resource to create on the server. Please make sure other resources referenced in the input resource are already present on the server.
title: Organization resource to create on the server

name: organization_resource_ids
description: If providing multiple IDs, separate them by a comma and a space. e.g. id_1, id_2, id_3. If leaving blank, test will use the resource id from Organization resource created by previous test.
title: ID(s) for a given profile resources present on the server

name: patient_resource_input
description: Provide a json resource to create on the server. Please make sure other resources referenced in the input resource are already present on the server.
title: Patient resource to create on the server

name: patient_resource_ids
description: If providing multiple IDs, separate them by a comma and a space. e.g. id_1, id_2, id_3. If leaving blank, test will use the resource id from Patient resource created by previous test.
title: ID(s) for TOC Patient resources present on the server

name: search_method
description: Method to use for the search request for invalid parameter error testing. Defaults to GET.
title: Search Method

name: deleted_resource_id
title: ID for a deleted resource from the server for deleted resource error testing

name: deleted_resource_type
title: Resource type for the deleted resource from the server for deleted resource error testing

name: unauthorized_patient_id
title: ID of an existing patient resource to retrieve for unauthorized request testing
